criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience, such as personalized recommendations, visual search, or chatbots.
criteria.sources: App features, official announcements, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall quality of the app's interface, ease of navigation, and user satisfaction.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, usability studies.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of features offered by the app, including payment options, product variety, and additional tools.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, feature lists, user reviews.

criteria.name: Market Presence
criteria.description: The app's popularity and reach, indicated by download numbers, active users, and market share.
criteria.sources: Market analysis reports, app store statistics.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The app's introduction of new technologies or unique features that set it apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: Industry news, app updates, press releases.
